items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'optimistic revision/versioning' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or details regarding how this requirement is being satisfied. While the linked use case mentions the need for optimistic revision/versioning, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality is implemented or validated. This leads to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
